description: A solid upper hemisphere with a diameter of 50mm, flat face on the XY plane, dome rising in the +Z direction, and centered at the origin.
notes: To model this, you can create a sphere of radius 25mm centered at (0,0,0) and cut it at the Z=0 plane to keep the positive Z half, or sketch a quarter-circle of radius 25mm on the XZ plane (from X=0 to 25, Z=0 to 25) and revolve it 360 degrees around the Z-axis.
